title: Naturality
description: Enchances old biomes and adds new ones!
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e940e292c93450d98e5dfaf537b73c31e8265990.png)
 
### Naturality is an enviromental mod that adds biomes and natural features to brighten up Minecraft world!
**This mod adds lots of new features like new biomes, trees, mobs and more!**

**Requires Terrablender to load correctly.**

<details>
<summary>Terrablender</summary>

**[https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)**

</details>
